title: Post-Public Agent Intake & First Feedback Triage

severityModel.P0: Active public exposure of real secret/customer data, exploitable security vulnerability in public assets, or materially misleading production/compliance claim requiring immediate correction.
severityModel.P1: Public docs or agent guidance materially misleading or broken; public snapshot packaging issue; broken examples preventing quickstart from working; confirmed security issue not yet exploitable.
severityModel.P2: Usability improvements, missing examples, wording clarity, non-blocking SDK or docs improvements.
severityModel.P3: Future ideas, roadmap suggestions, architectural feedback outside current Developer Preview scope.

firstWeekChecklist: Review new GitHub Issues; assign triage category and severity
Check for new security reports via SECURITY.md or direct contact
Verify no unexpected files in public repository (backend/, .claude/, secrets)
Confirm README accurately describes Developer Preview scope (no production-ready claims)
Confirm no tenant-isolation-implemented claims in public content
Check for unexpected GitHub Actions or CI activity on public repository
Review GitHub dependency and security alerts if visible
Check for coding-agent reports mentioning GrantLayer
Triage questions about production readiness or tenant isolation
Confirm no private hostnames, internal paths, or internal IP ranges are publicly visible
Review any pull requests filed against the public repository
Check public scanner status against current public HEAD
securityReportHandling: Do not request real secrets or customer data
Use direct public hotfix only for documented P0 emergency with active public exposure
Preserve evidence and audit notes internally
Do not disclose unmitigated issue publicly before fix is published

conditions: Active public exposure of real secret, customer data, or materially harmful content
Change is minimum necessary to remove harmful content
No broad refactors or unrelated changes included

caveats: internal Forgejo remains source of truth
